generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. Some politicians want to cut defense budgets, but that just shifts the burden to our troops. Strong alliances mean shared responsibility - we can't afford to go it alone. #SupportOurAllies #NationalSecurity
